About Mountain View Painters, LLC

12+ years serving Phoenix and surrounding areas

Mountain View Painters, LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Phoenix homeowners with painting services that stand the test of time. We're not just slapping on paint; we're protecting your investment against the harsh Arizona sun.

Our approach is rooted in meticulous preparation, premium materials, and skilled application. We understand the unique challenges of painting in the desert climate, from fading colors to cracking stucco. We address every project with precision and care.

We're proud to be a part of the Phoenix community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. When you choose Mountain View Painters, you're supporting a business that's invested in the Valley's future.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Mountain View Painters, LLC

Trusted painting contractor professionals serving Phoenix, AZ and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
